paths.name: Agent
paths.summary: A path for subtle operators who win through observation, misdirection, and perfectly timed strikes. Specialties: Investigator (reading people and solving mysteries), Spy (false identities and infiltration), Thief (risk-taking, dirty fighting, and larceny).

paths.name: Envoy
paths.summary: A path for steadfast speakers who bolster allies and defuse enemies through force of conviction. Specialties: Diplomat (challenging and pacifying opponents), Faithful (sustaining allies' focus and resolve), Mentor (teaching, guiding, and reviving companions).

paths.name: Hunter
paths.summary: A path for relentless pursuers who mark a quarry and take it down with ranged precision, lethal stealth, or traps and animal partners. Specialties: Archer (ranged combat and mobility), Assassin (ambushes and finishing strikes), Tracker (traps, foraging, and an animal companion).

paths.name: Leader
paths.summary: A path for commanders who direct allies with a command die and turn battles through coordination, logistics, or intrigue. Specialties: Champion (leading from the front), Officer (troop coordination and supply), Politico (rumor, division, and deception).

paths.name: Scholar
paths.summary: A path for thinkers who out-plan and out-build their problems. Specialties: Artifabrian (crafting fabrials and gemstone devices), Strategist (timing, contingencies, and battlefield analysis), Surgeon (healing, diagnosis, and recovery).

paths.name: Warrior
paths.summary: A path for fighters built on stances, discipline, and battlefield endurance. Specialties: Duelist (fighting stances and dueling pressure), Shardbearer (Shardblade, Shardplate, and heavy shard combat), Soldier (formation fighting and staying power).

paths.name: Dustbringer
paths.summary: The Order of Releasers, bonded to ashspren. Their surges are Abrasion (friction control and skating) and Division (decay and burning destruction). Historically distrusted for their annihilating power; their philosophy centers on confronting and controlling destruction responsibly.

paths.name: Edgedancer
paths.summary: An order bonded to cultivationspren, revering Cultivation. Their surges are Abrasion (friction control and skating) and Progression (growth and regrowth healing). Their philosophy emphasizes remembering the forgotten and listening to the ignored.

paths.name: Elsecaller
paths.summary: An order bonded to inkspren. Their surges are Transformation (Soulcasting matter between Essences) and Transportation (realm-crossing and teleportation). Their philosophy focuses on self-improvement and reaching one's potential.

paths.name: Lightweaver
paths.summary: An order bonded to Cryptics. Their surges are Illumination (light and sound illusions) and Transformation (Soulcasting). Their progression works through speaking personal Truths, and their philosophy centers on self-honesty and creative expression.

paths.name: Skybreaker
paths.summary: An order bonded to highspren, devoted to justice and the rule of law. Their surges are Division (decay and destruction) and Gravitation (Lashings and flight). Their philosophy centers on justice and commitment to a chosen code.

paths.name: Stoneward
paths.summary: An order bonded to peakspren. Their surges are Cohesion (shaping and moving through stone) and Tension (stiffening materials). Their philosophy centers on being there when needed and standing with allies through hardship.
